title: Support board permissions using API when creating board from template

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: Now that the API V2 supports creating boards from a template (wow…very nice ) it is even more important that templates supports board permissions. My solution uses multiple (4) boards and some boards need to be set to “Edit rows assigned to them in the Owner(s) column” while other boards are set to “Edit content”.

posts.author: Scott-monday.com (Scott Underwood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @basdebruin

It’s been some time since you posted this suggestion, but I did want to touch base to let you know that your feedback in regards to this has previously been passed along to the team

As always, please let us know if you have any other suggestions as to how we might improve our API! Without feedback from amazing monday.com users such as yourself, we certainly wouldn’t be where we are today

-Scott
